values.description: Intake REST API with native WAF integration
KMS key for acme-health resource encryption
Security group for the Intake Lambda function

after.description: Intake REST API with native WAF integration
KMS key for acme-health resource encryption
Security group for the Intake Lambda function

encryption_algorithm.description: Server-side encryption algorithm in effect (SC-28 attestation).

uploads_bucket_arn.description: S3 bucket ARN where intake attachments land.

uploads_bucket_name.description: S3 bucket name where intake attachments land.

vault_name.description: S3 bucket name of the evidence vault. Feed this to capture-evidence.sh --vault.

description.constant_value: Intake REST API with native WAF integration
KMS key for acme-health resource encryption
Security group for the Intake Lambda function

environment.description: Deployment environment. Drives the Environment tag and downstream policy decisions.

lock_mode.description: GOVERNANCE for lab work; COMPLIANCE for real evidence.

project_name.description: Short project identifier. Becomes part of bucket names and the Project tag.

retention_days.description: Default retention applied to every uploaded object.

suffix.description: Optional suffix to force a specific resource name. Defaults to a random_id.
